title: bidens calva
intro: Bidens calva, also known as naked beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe of the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens calva include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health, making it a valuable herb for treating respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Bidens calva can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its potential therapeutic benefits.
